steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The subject is One species, the silverleaf sunflower, and the sentence needs a main verb before the object phrase beginning with both an early-flowering ecotype. The verb must be finite and agree with the singular subject.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite verbs
steps.content: Choice A is a participial phrase, not a finite main verb. Choice B is also nonfinite. Choice C is an infinitive, which cannot serve as the main verb of this sentence. The answer is D.
